title: EzCobwebs
description: This plugin adds a crafting recipes for cobwebs
body:
## 🕸️ EzCobwebs Plugin
EzCobwebs is a lightweight and configurable Minecraft plugin that allows players to craft cobwebs using string or any materials you define. By default, it adds a simple cross-shaped recipe using five strings, but you can fully customize the recipe layout and ingredients via the config.yml file.

Perfect for survival servers, PvP traps, adventure maps, or aesthetic builders who want easier access to cobwebs without creative mode. No commands or permissions required—just plug and play!
